productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Striped Shirt
description: CompositionBlack shirt with grey stripes made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryTrust united colors of benetton to nail the minimalistic mood of the moment in its formal wear for men. With its soothing, subtle colour patterning and luxe fabric, this shirt looks good styled with a simple pair of chinos or under a structured blazer for a layered look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
